sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, time_string VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, stringtime(time_string) AS converted_time, 'Conversion of ' || COALESCE(time_string, 'NULL') AS status FROM test_table;
SELECT id, stringtime('2023-10-01 ' || time_string) AS full_time FROM test_table WHERE time_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE stringtime(time_string) = stringtime('12:00:00') || ' UTC';
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT a.ref_id, stringtime(t.time_string) AS time_converted FROM another_table a JOIN test_table t ON a.ref_id = t.id WHERE stringtime(t.time_string) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT stringtime('19:00:00' || '') AS concat_time, MIN(stringtime(time_string)) AS min_time FROM test_table GROUP BY time_string HAVING MIN(stringtime(time_string)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT stringtime('23:59:59' || time_string) AS edge_case_time FROM test_table ORDER BY edge_case_time;

SELECT id, stringtime((SELECT MAX(time_string) FROM test_table WHERE time_string IS NOT NULL) || ' +00:00') AS max_time_plus_zero FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM another_table WHERE ref_id = test_table.id);
